name: library
default-mythos-hint: A vast archive of accumulated knowledge, where memory and meaning cohabit the shelves.

name: forge
default-mythos-hint: A place of transformation where raw material becomes purpose.

name: throne-room
default-mythos-hint: The seat of sovereignty, where decisions echo through every chamber.

name: garden
default-mythos-hint: A living space of cultivation, where intention meets growth.

name: courtyard
default-mythos-hint: An open gathering place that connects all chambers.

name: lab
default-mythos-hint: A space of systematic inquiry and iterative discovery.

name: crypt
default-mythos-hint: A hall of deep memory where what was preserved endures.

name: portal
default-mythos-hint: A threshold between worlds, a point of passage and transition.

name: atrium
default-mythos-hint: The luminous heart of the palace, where all paths converge.

name: cell
default-mythos-hint: A contemplative chamber of singular focus and stillness.

name: scroll
default-mythos-hint: A vessel of encoded wisdom, unfurled in time.

name: lantern
default-mythos-hint: A source of illumination carried into the unknown.

name: vessel
default-mythos-hint: A container that shapes what it holds.

name: compass
default-mythos-hint: An instrument of orientation amid uncertainty.

name: seed
default-mythos-hint: A latent beginning holding the shape of what may come.

name: muse
default-mythos-hint: The voice that whispers possibility into the listening mind.

name: judge
default-mythos-hint: The discerning presence that weighs and decides.

name: midwife
default-mythos-hint: The guide who tends the passage from potential to being.

name: trickster
default-mythos-hint: The disruptor who reveals hidden truths through misdirection.
